notes: The game starts and runs beautifully without adjustment.  However, the game will crash to desktop when attempting to load any saved game, preventing progression across multiple sessions.
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords

notes: Proton 3.7-8 game is crashing when you choose aim (LLP) and back to desktop. Proton 3.16-7 works fine. Small problem with low FPS about 30-35/s medium. Good game ;)
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords

notes: Runs great from a default install; however, it will crash to desktop when attempting to load saved games.  The game creates a zero-length "screen shot" for each save in BMP format, and crashes when it attempts to open it later during the load game process.  A workaround to this is to delete all .bmp files from your .steam/steamapps/common/Starpoint Gemini Warlords/Saves folder before starting the game each time.
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords

notes: Crashed in the first scene when targeting the battleship. A pity, seems like a beautiful game.
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords

notes: Seems to load and save fine thus far.
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords

notes: I downloaded it today, and since i played it on windows 10 i already had some saves, loaded most recent one. And i played it for an hour or so. No issues, some fps drops when entering Concordia and other star bases, but nothing during space battles. No tweaks or changes, straight steam play install.
title: Starpoint Gemini Warlords
